articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?
articles.description: We have the final 26-player squads that can win the FIFA World Cup, so let's go through all 48 teams and rank where they stand.

keyEvents.text: Goal! Curaçao 1, Trinidad and Tobago 0. Kenji Gorré (Curaçao) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner.
Dante Sealy (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Leandro Bacuna (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Kevin Molino replaces Molik Khan.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Déron Payne replaces Dante Sealy.
Substitution, Curaçao. Jürgen Locadia replaces Gervane Kastaneer.
Substitution, Curaçao. Jearl Margaritha replaces Jeremy Antonisse.
Second Half begins Curaçao 1, Trinidad and Tobago 0.
Goal! Curaçao 1, Trinidad and Tobago 1. Tyrese Spicer (Trinidad and Tobago) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Rio Cardines.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Daniel Phillips replaces Andre Rampersad because of an injury.
Substitution, Curaçao. Godfried Roemeratoe replaces Livano Comenencia.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Wayne Frederick replaces Josiah Trimmingham.
Armando Obispo (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Nathaniel James replaces Tyrese Spicer.
Juriën Gaari (Curaçao) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Curaçao 1, Trinidad and Tobago 1.
